signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with 97% odds on December 31 and over $121M in total X markets volume; traders on X are buzzing about this as the top sentiment gauge amid ongoing tensions.[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with 88% on 300-319 | NO | MED**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with 88% on 300-319 | NO | MED**  
X users highlight "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" as highly active ($13M volume), with 88% crowd odds on 300-319 tweets; whale activity implied by volume, but no specific bets detailed.[3]
